init.title: Philips Shaver Settings

data_description.poll_interval: The recommended interval is {rec_int} seconds and a maximum of {max_int} seconds.

init.description: The polling interval determines the time between requests to update the device information if Live Update is not enabled.

user.title: Add Philips Shaver
user.description: Choose how to connect to your shaver.

user_bleak.title: Direct Bluetooth
user_bleak.description: Enter the Bluetooth MAC address of the shaver.

esp_bridge.title: ESP32 Bridge (ESPHome)
esp_bridge.description: Select the ESPHome device that acts as the BLE bridge for your shaver.

data_description.esp_device_name: The ESPHome device that runs the Philips Shaver BLE bridge component.

bluetooth_confirm.title: Confirm detected device
bluetooth_confirm.description: Do you want to add the detected Philips Shaver "{name}" to Home Assistant?

show_capabilities.title: Hardware Capabilities detected
show_capabilities.description:
Successfully connected to **{name}**.

**Hardware Capabilities:**
{capabilities}

**GATT Service Status:**
{services}

**Legend:**
✅ Service found & supported
❌ Expected service missing
❔ Unknown service from device

Click Submit to finish the setup.

error.no_esphome_devices: No ESPHome devices found. Please set up an ESPHome device with the BLE bridge component first. See the [ESP Bridge Setup Guide](https://github.com/mtheli/philips_shaver/blob/main/ESP_BRIDGE_SETUP.md) for instructions.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the shaver. Please ensure it is powered on, in range, and not connected to another device (e.g. your phone).
error.device_not_found: Device not found. Please ensure it is powered on and in range.
error.not_paired: The shaver is not paired with this system. Please pair it first using `bluetoothctl pair <MAC>` via SSH. See the README for detailed instructions.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Please check the logs.

abort.already_in_progress: Configuration flow is already in progress.
abort.no_devices_found: No supported Philips Shaver devices were found in range.

color_low.name: Color: Low
color_low.description: RGB color used for low shaver status.

color_ok.name: Color: OK
color_ok.description: RGB color used for normal shaver status.

color_high.name: Color: High
color_high.description: RGB color used for high shaver status.

color_motion.name: Color: Motion
color_motion.description: RGB color used for the motion lighting effect.
